channel.title: Streamlined on Mr.Tinkerer's Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Streamlined on Mr.Tinkerer's Blogs

item.title: Improving the Blog Script
item.description:
The Problem

So after I created the blog site, and publish the gaming VM blog, I realised that the blog script that I wrote has some flaws with it. The (current) problems is the following:

  • The script doesn’t manually update the date
  • The script doesn’t give me a preview of the blog before publishing.
  • Stop when the script encounters an error.
  • Stop when there is no description/tags.

Blog’s Templates

Something else that I forgot to mention in the blog is that I used the Obsidian’s Templater plugin to automatically insert the font matter with the correct info. Now I did use Claude for this, since at the time, I didn’t felt like learning Templater’s syntax. But this is what the template file looks like. Just make sure to put it in the Templates folder in order for the plugin to be able to use it.

item.title: How I Streamline the Creation of Blogs
item.description:
The Issue

So I have written the two blogs (The Laptop Proxmox Blog, and Laptop NAS build), but I don’t have a way to share them. I have written in markdown file (via Obsidian), since it would be easy for me to write them. The problem is that you can’t just put a markdown file into a web server and expect it to work. So I would need to find a way to convert them into HTML. So after a some research, I have developed a plan.
